info.name: OpenClaw Mail Helper
info.summary: API endpoint that saves IMAP-Drafts-with-attachments for the OpenClaw agent.
info.description:
Adds a single REST route: POST /apps/openclaw_mail/api/draft.
Reuses the Nextcloud Mail app's TransmissionService + MimeMessage builder to assemble a full MIME message (text/html + attachments from /apps/mail/api/attachments), then APPENDs it directly to the account's IMAP Drafts mailbox.
Workaround for upstream nextcloud/mail#458 (open since 2017): the canonical accounts#draft endpoint silently drops attachments, and the outbox endpoint stores drafts in Nextcloud's local DB rather than the IMAP Drafts folder.
info.author: cberg-home-nextgen
